name: Discord Cache
description: Cached images, videos, and scripts from Discord.
impact: Slower image loading when scrolling up in old chats.

name: Slack Cache
description: Cached workspace data and images for Slack.
impact: Workspaces might take an extra second to load initially.

name: Spotify Cache
description: Cached songs and album art for Spotify.
impact: Recently played songs will need to be re-downloaded. Does not delete your playlists.
